name: Agere Systems Inc.
description: Agere Systems Inc. was a premier provider of semiconductor components and software solutions for storage, wireless, and multiservice networks. Spun off from Lucent Technologies in 2001, the company designed and manufactured integrated circuits and optoelectronic components that powered advanced communications systems. Agere's products enabled high-speed data transfer, storage, and processing across various consumer and enterprise applications. In 2007, Agere Systems merged with LSI Logic Corporation to form LSI Corporation, which was subsequently acquired by Avago Technologies, now operating as Broadcom Inc.
